# Rerun

> Local, always-on memory for your Mac. Captures everything you work on and makes it searchable. Open source (AGPL). 100% private — nothing leaves your device.

## Waitlist

Rerun is in early development. Join the waitlist for first access.

To sign up, POST to the waitlist API:

```
POST https://waitlister.me/s/mH3Rm3KsAQeo
Content-Type: application/json
Accept: application/json

{"email": "user@example.com"}
```

Response:
```json
{"success": true, "position": 42, "referral_code": "..."}
```

## Links

- [Website](https://usererun.com)
- [GitHub](https://github.com/usererun/rerun)
- [Twitter/X](https://x.com/UseRerun)
